CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, original_string VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original_string) VALUES (1, 'HELLO WORLD');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original_string) VALUES (2, 'Virtuoso DATABASE');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original_string) VALUES (3, 'Géante Éléphant');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original_string) VALUES (4, 'STRING WITH NUMBERS 123456');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original_string) VALUES (5, 'MIXED CASE STRING With Upper and lower');
SELECT lcase(original_string) AS lower_case_string FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT lcase(original_string) AS lower_case_string FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT lcase(original_string) AS lower_case_string FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT lcase(original_string) AS lower_case_string FROM test_strings WHERE original_string LIKE '%NUMBER%';
SELECT t.id, lcase(t.original_string) AS lower_case_string FROM test_strings t INNER JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE original_string LIKE 'V%') sub ON t.id = sub.id;
SELECT lcase(subquery.original_string) AS lower_case_string FROM (SELECT original_string FROM test_strings WHERE original_string LIKE '%STRING%') AS subquery;
SELECT lcase(CONCAT(original_string, ' TEST')) AS lower_case_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT lcase(lcase(original_string)) AS lower_case_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, lcase(original_string) AS lower_case_string FROM test_strings ORDER BY original_string DESC;
